name: Sunoaki Network Premium Connection
notes:
Sunoaki Network Premium Connection (AS397958) is operated by Sunoaki Network LLC.

We have a restrictive peering policy. You should primarily establish peering with our backbone network (AS47778). Any peering connections from AS47778 will be directed to AS397958. 

We only establish peering with the Premium Connection if we deem it necessary or if it is a paid peering session.

For peering details, please contact us first.
